series_metadata.series_title: Confirmations of collateral pledged by depository banks to trustees
series_metadata.series_description: Depository banks pledge required collateral directly to qualified trustees pursuant to R.C. Chapter 135. Trustees then send a confirmation of the receipt of such pledge directly to the Treasurer. The confirmation generally includes a description of the pledged security, the amount of the security, maturity date, interest rate, and names of the pledgor and pledgee.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: duration that collateral remains pledged and active; once collateral is released or substituted, confirmation with corresponding forms documenting Release or Substitution of Pledged Collateral (SEC-603) conclusion of fiscal year in which collateral is released, 4 additional fiscal years. ; Paper: duration that collateral remains pledged and active; once collateral is released or substituted, confirmation with corresponding forms documenting Release or Substitution of Pledged Collateral (SEC-603) conclusion of fiscal year in which collateral is released, 4 additional fiscal years
